CIP-0.title: Certified Innovation Professional Level 0: Innovation Champion
CIP-0.description: The Certified Innovation Professional - Innovation Champion certification is designed for professionals beginning their innovation journey. Participants get acquainted with business innovation and learn the key tools and techniques of innovation management to take their first step toward becoming innovation practitioners.

CIP-1.title: Certified Innovation Professional Level 1: Associate
CIP-1.description: The Certified Innovation Professional Level 1: Associate certification is designed for individuals who want to understand business innovation and the processes needed to generate breakthrough ideas. Participants learn idea generation tools and how to apply them to create more and better ideas for their organizations.

CIP-2.title: Certified Innovation Professional Level 2: Master
CIP-2.description: The Certified Innovation Professional Level 2: Master certification is designed for individuals ready to apply Associate Level 1 learnings to a real-world challenge. Participants build a case study on generating new growth ideas or opportunities for their organization, document their process and learnings, and submit it for expert evaluation and feedback.

CIP-MC.title: CIP Masterclass
CIP-MC.description: The Certified Innovation Professional (CIP) program by GIMI helps professionals build practical innovation knowledge, tools, and methodologies to drive innovation within organizations. It includes two levels: Level 1 Associate: Covers innovation fundamentals, tools, and skills to develop effective innovation ideas and results. Level 2 Master: Focuses on applying these skills to solve real-world challenges and create innovation opportunities for organizations.

CCIO-1.title: Certified Chief Innovation Officer Level 3: Manager
CCIO-1.description: The Certified Chief Innovation Officer Level 3: Manager certification is designed for managers taking their first step toward becoming a Certified Chief Innovation Officer. Participants gain an advanced understanding of business innovation strategy, capacity, and discipline to manage innovation effectively within their organizations. It is built on the GIMI High-Performance Innovation framework (SCDP): Strategy, Capacity, Discipline and Performance.

CCIO-2.title: Certified Chief Innovation Officer Level 4: Leader
CCIO-2.description: The Certified Chief Innovation Officer Level 4: Leader certification is designed for senior professionals ready to apply Manager Level 3 learnings to real organizational challenges. Participants submit a documented experience on an Innovation Ecosystem or Innovation Portfolio Management initiative, generating insights and solutions for managing innovation within organizations. It applies the GIMI SCDP framework (Strategy, Capacity, Discipline, Performance) to build and run an enterprise innovation management system.

CCIO-MC.title: CCIO Masterclass
CCIO-MC.description: The CCIO Masterclass is a 4-week virtual masterclass led by globally recognized innovation experts followed by a 3-4 month mentoring program to build their innovation management system using the GIMI SCDP framework (Strategy, Capacity, Discipline, Performance). It certifies a professional has the broad range of knowledge required to function as a successful manager and leader of enterprise-wide innovation programs.

CGIS-1.title: Certified GIMI Impact: Students
CGIS-1.description: The Certified GIMI Impact: Students certification is designed for high school students who want to be more innovative and compassionate. Participants learn how to apply creativity and structured problem-solving to address complex challenges around the world.

CGIT.title: Certified GIMI Impact: Teachers
CGIT.description: The Certified GIMI Impact Teacher is a certificate designed to empower high school teachers to teach students in high school to be more innovative, compassionate, and solve complex problems around the world.

CGT.title: Certified GIMI Trainer
CGT.description: The Certified GIMI Trainer certification is designed for certified GIMI individuals who want to train others on GIMI methodologies, whether inside or outside their organization. Participants develop mastery in delivering GIMI frameworks and tools, learn to explain key innovation concepts clearly, and use GIMI's materials to build a training and certification business in innovation management.

PBCC.title: Problem Solving Certified Catalyst
PBCC.description: The Problem Solving Certified Catalyst is designed for individuals from all backgrounds who want to develop a structured approach to creative problem-solving. Participants learn innovation tools, techniques, and an innovative mindset through a purpose-driven, five-step ideation process � Setup, Diverge, Connect, Converge, and Emerge � moving from challenge selection to actionable solution concepts and pitch-ready brochures.

CDT-1.title: Certified Design Thinking: Level 1
CDT-1.description: The Certified Design Thinking Level 1 certification is designed for individuals who want to master human-centered design to solve complex problems and improve user experiences. Participants build a strong foundation in Design Thinking through its three stages: Immerse (capturing user insights and building empathy), Invent (defining problem statements and generating creative solutions), and Implement (prototyping, testing, and iterating).

CDT-2.title: Certified Design Thinking: Level 2
CDT-2.description: The Certified Design Thinking Level 2 certification is designed for individuals ready to apply Design Thinking methods to real organizational challenges. Participants document their process, insights, and outcomes in a white paper that showcases how they used the Immerse, Invent, and Implement stages, gaining the skills and confidence to lead Design Thinking across diverse contexts.

CDTT-3.title: Certified Design Thinking Trainer
CDTT-3.description: The Certified Design Thinking Trainer certification is designed for certified Design Thinking individuals who want to train others on the methodology. Through a 3-session online masterclass, participants master facilitation of the Immerse, Invent, and Implement stages and learn to guide teams through each phase, creating a collaborative and innovative environment.

CAAP.title: Certified AI Agent Practitioner
CAAP.description: The Certified AI Agent Practitioner certification is designed for teams and individuals ready to operationalize AI in their organizations. Through a hands-on, executive-ready workshop, participants identify a real business need, design an AI-powered solution, and build a functional agent mock-up to explore multiple solutions, reduce bias, and focus on execution-ready outcomes.

CGA.title: Certified GIMI Auditor
CGA.description: The Certified GIMI Auditor certification is designed for professionals who conduct or oversee audits of innovation management systems aligned with global standards like ISO 56001. Participants gain an in-depth understanding of GIMI and ISO 56001 standards and practical tools to assess the innovation maturity of different organizations. The pathway requires completing the Certified Innovation Management (CIM) Level 3 Certification before pursuing the GIMI Certified Auditor (GCA) Certification.

CIME.title: Certified ISO Innovation Management Expert
CIME.description: The ISO Innovation Management Expert certification is designed for leaders who want to establish, implement, and improve Innovation Management Systems (IMS) in full alignment with the ISO 56000 family. Participants gain a complete framework to design and systematize innovation management, moving beyond sporadic creativity to disciplined performance.

CTC.title: Certified Technology Catalyst
CTC.description: The Technology Catalyst certification is designed for individuals who want to thrive in a world where innovation is essential. Participants leverage over 130 breakthrough technologies to identify emerging trends, make sense of disruption, and craft strategies that position themselves or their organizations as future-ready leaders.

CLC.title: Certified Longevity Catalyst
CLC.description: The Certified Longevity Catalyst is designed for individuals who want to lead the shift from an aging society to a longevity society, using innovation to enhance both lifespan and healthspan. Drawing on the 2025 GIMI Think Tank Longevity Series, participants explore brain health and cognitive longevity, the societal and economic implications of longevity, breakthrough innovations across robotics, nutrition, AI, technology, design, and policy, and mindsets that redefine aging as a phase of purpose and contribution.

CFF-1.title: Certified Foresight Professional: Level 1
CFF-1.description: The Certified Foresight Professional Level 1 certification is designed for individuals who want to question current assumptions and strengthen analytical and intuitive mindsets. Participants gain essential knowledge of future foresight, including fundamentals and literacy, key premises and principles, and a comprehensive immersion into the main schools of thought and practice.

CFF-2.title: Certified Foresight Leader: Level 2
CFF-2.description: The Certified Foresight Leader Level 2 certification is designed for individuals who want to master the end-to-end foresight process. Participants learn the S4 Futures framework � Scoping, Scanning, Scenarios, and Strategy � and explore multiple foresight methodologies and tools to manage foresight projects.

CFF-3.title: Certified Foresight Officer: Level 3
CFF-3.description: The Certified Chief Foresight Officer Level 3 certification is designed for individuals ready to apply Levels 1 and 2 knowledge to a relevant organizational challenge. Participants demonstrate the capacity to lead a Foresight Project, integrating methodological phases and the appropriate tools.

CFF-4.title: Certified Trainer In Future Foresight Level 1
CFF-4.description: The Certified Future Foresight Trainer Level 1 certification is designed for Future Foresight certified individuals (Levels 1 and 2) who want to train others. Participants develop the ability to prepare candidates inside or outside their organization to obtain the FF Certification Level 1.

CFF-5.title: Certified Trainer In Future Foresight Level 2
CFF-5.description: The Certified Future Foresight Trainer Level 2 certification is designed for Future Foresight certified individuals (Levels 1, 2, and 3) who want to train others at an advanced level. Participants develop the ability to prepare candidates inside or outside their organization to obtain the FF Certification Level 2.

CLF-1.title: Certified Leader for the Future
CLF-1.description: The Certified Leader for the Future certification is designed for individuals who want to lead collaboratively and become the best version of themselves. Participants develop strong leadership values that support their vision and learn to use the Powers of AND to drive effective results and navigate the ambiguity and volatility of the business environment.

CIL.title: Certified Innovation Leader
CIL.description: The Certified Innovation Leader is designed for leaders who want to turn innovation from a chaotic event into a repeatable leadership competency. Recognizing that innovation fails from a lack of system, not ideas, participants use the SCD Framework to gain the mental models and tactical tools to drive measurable change. Across three modules � Strategy (the North Star and when to innovate), Capacity (the people, processes, and resources to turn ideas into reality), and Discipline (the culture, habits, and metrics that sustain growth) � they learn to lead innovation as a structured, repeatable practice.

MCI-1.title: Certified Management Consulting Level 1: Analyst
MCI-1.description: The Management Consulting Level 1: Analyst certification focuses on the fundamentals of management consulting. Analysts will develop key skills in analytical techniques, problem-solving methodologies, and the foundational knowledge required to tackle complex business challenges. It targets students and professionals aiming to develop foundational skills to think and act like a consultant, delivering structured, quality output. Content covers thinking, acting, researching, and presenting like a consultant.

MCI-2.title: Certified Management Consulting Level 2: Consultant
MCI-2.description: The Management Consulting Level 2: Consultant certification is designed for individuals ready to apply Level 1 learnings to real-world consulting projects. Participants work on a team project sponsored by a senior-level sponsor within 12 months of earning Level 1, learning Situation�Complication�Question analysis, issue analysis, project presentation, and peer feedback to transform insights into actionable, measurable solutions.

MCI-3.title: Certified Management Consulting Level 3: Manager
MCI-3.description: The Management Consulting Level 3: Manager certification is designed for professionals aspiring to take on strategic consulting roles. Participants learn Strategy Formulation, Strategy Execution Planning, Strategy Execution, and the REALIZE Strategy Execution Methodology to bridge the gap between strategy formulation and execution with precision and impact.

MCI-4.title: Certified Management Consulting Level 4: Leader
MCI-4.description: The Management Consulting Level 4: Certified Leader certification is designed for Management Consultant Managers ready to shape the future of the industry. Participants build on Level 3 by working on a team project sponsored by a senior-level sponsor within 12 months of earning Level 3, focusing on visionary leadership, advanced strategy execution, and driving organizational impact.
